blocker: Real human-in-the-loop MTTR measurement needs an operator pool + a controlled staged-incident replay lab (production A/B is unethical: can't withhold a helpful tool during customer impact); not available in a batch job, so speedup numbers are from a planted-effect simulation that validates the analysis, not a real agent.
one_line: Designed within- and between-subjects MTTR experiment (log-space GM-ratio speedup endpoint + bootstrap CI/t-test/Wilcoxon/Mann-Whitney/Cliff's-delta, scipy-optional), built a self-validating analysis harness + an A9-grounded synthetic trial generator, and verified it recovers a planted 1.5-1.9x speedup while correctly reporting a null (negative control).
